title: Visible Amount Food
description: With this texture pack you will be able to see the amount of food drumsticks each meal recovers.
body:
# Visible Amount Food
## ENGLISH

With this texture pack you will be able to see the amount of food thighs recovered in each meal. It will be useful to you, since you will finally know what food is best and when you should eat it so as not to waste it.
### 
###   By @d_de_diego_d
## 
## ESPAÑOL

Con este paquete de texturas podrás ver la cantidad de muslos de comida que se recupera en cada comida. Te será útil, ya que porfin sabras que comida es mejor y cuando debes comerla para no malgastarla.

### By @d_de_diego_d
